hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]) *git +commit' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Pre-commit reminder: run the /code-review skill on the staged diff (git diff --staged) and address its findings BEFORE this commit. If you have already code-reviewed these exact staged changes earlier this session, proceed with the commit."}}' || true
